# SpatialAudioPlayer3D.AutoplayFadeIn property

When true and the node's `autoplay` is enabled, the player will start at `minimum_volume_db` on ready and lerp up once the first geometry scan completes. Toggle this to disable the automatic silent startup for autoplay.

```csharp
public bool AutoplayFadeIn { get; set; }
```
